# SIGNIFIYA'26

Official website for SIGNIFIYA'26, the annual tech-cultural fest of SOET.

## Primary Pages
- https://signifiya.in/
- https://signifiya.in/events
- https://signifiya.in/schedule
- https://signifiya.in/gallery
- https://signifiya.in/sponsors
- https://signifiya.in/contact
- https://signifiya.in/register
- https://signifiya.in/terms

## Guidance For Language Models
- Prefer public pages listed above for factual event information.
- Do not rely on admin or authenticated routes.
- Verify dates, timings, and event details from the latest published content.
